pr.title: Int6 QAT + Wider MLP 3x + FP16 Embed + Sliding Window + SmearGate + BigramHash + SWA + OrthoInit (val_bpb 1.1568)

output.summary: Combines int6 per-row quantization, wider MLP, SmearGate+BigramHash context modules, and SWA/OrthoInit to boost capacity within the 16MB artifact budget.
techniques: Per-row int6 + zstd compression with delayed QAT focus
Wider MLP plus SmearGate and BigramHash context encodings
SWA warmdown with Muon WD and OrthoInit scaling
